name: EdwIdsMadorGrpExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH EDW_Group_Data_CTE AS ( SELECT GRP.GRP_ID, GRP.SRC_SYS_CD, GRP.GRP_NM, GRP.GRP_ADDR_LN_1, GRP.GRP_ADDR_LN_2, GRP.GRP_ADDR_LN_3, GRP.GRP_CITY_NM, GRP.GRP_ST_CD, GRP.GRP_ZIP_CD_5, GRP.GRP_ZIP_CD_4, GRP.GRP_CNTCT_FIRST_NM, GRP.GRP_CNTCT_MIDINIT, GRP.GRP_CNTCT_LAST_NM FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.GRP_D AS GRP INNER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.MBR_D AS MBR_D ON GRP.GRP_SK = MBR_D.GRP_SK INNER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.MBR_ENR_D AS MBR_ENR_D ON MBR_D.MBR_SK = MBR_ENR_D.MBR_SK WHERE MBR_D.SRC_SYS_CD = '@{pipeline().parameters.SrcSysCd}' AND MBR_ENR_D.MBR_ENR_ELIG_IN = 'Y' AND MBR_ENR_D.MBR_ENR_CLS_PLN_PROD_CAT_CD = 'MED' AND MBR_ENR_D.MBR_ENR_TERM_DT_SK >= '@{pipeline().parameters.Begin_Date}' AND MBR_ENR_D.MBR_ENR_EFF_DT_SK <= '@{pipeline().parameters.End_Date}' AND MBR_ENR_D.GRP_ID NOT IN ('10000000','10001000','10003000','10004000','10022000','10023000','10024000') AND SUBSTRING(MBR_ENR_D.GRP_ID,1,2) <> '65' AND MBR_D.MBR_HOME_ADDR_ST_CD = 'MA' AND MBR_D.MBR_HOME_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5 < '10000' AND MBR_D.MBR_HOME_ADDR_CITY_NM NOT IN ('KANSAS CITY','LEES SUMMIT','ST CHARLES','LEES SUMMITT') AND MBR_ENR_D.GRP_ID IS NOT NULL UNION SELECT GRP.GRP_ID, GRP.SRC_SYS_CD, GRP.GRP_NM, GRP.GRP_ADDR_LN_1, GRP.GRP_ADDR_LN_2, GRP.GRP_ADDR_LN_3, GRP.GRP_CITY_NM, GRP.GRP_ST_CD, GRP.GRP_ZIP_CD_5, GRP.GRP_ZIP_CD_4, GRP.GRP_CNTCT_FIRST_NM, GRP.GRP_CNTCT_MIDINIT, GRP.GRP_CNTCT_LAST_NM FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.GRP_D AS GRP INNER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.MBR_D AS MBR_D ON GRP.GRP_SK = MBR_D.GRP_SK INNER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.MBR_ENR_D AS MBR_ENR_D ON MBR_D.MBR_SK = MBR_ENR_D.MBR_SK INNER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.MBR_GNRL_LOC_HIST_D AS HIST_D ON MBR_D.MBR_SK = HIST_D.MBR_SK WHERE MBR_D.SRC_SYS_CD = '@{pipeline().parameters.SrcSysCd}' AND MBR_ENR_D.MBR_ENR_ELIG_IN = 'Y' AND MBR_ENR_D.MBR_ENR_CLS_PLN_PROD_CAT_CD = 'MED' AND MBR_ENR_D.MBR_ENR_TERM_DT_SK >= '@{pipeline().parameters.Begin_Date}' AND MBR_ENR_D.MBR_ENR_EFF_DT_SK <= '@{pipeline().parameters.End_Date}' AND HIST_D.MBR_HOME_ADDR_ST_CD = 'MA' AND HIST_D.MBR_HOME_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5 < '10000' AND HIST_D.EDW_RCRD_END_DT_SK >= '@{pipeline().parameters.Begin_Date}' AND MBR_ENR_D.GRP_ID NOT IN ('10000000','10001000','10003000','10004000','10022000','10023000','10024000') AND SUBSTRING(MBR_ENR_D.GRP_ID,1,2) <> '65' AND MBR_D.MBR_HOME_ADDR_ST_CD <> 'MA' AND MBR_D.MBR_HOME_ADDR_CITY_NM <> HIST_D.MBR_HOME_ADDR_CITY_NM AND HIST_D.MBR_HOME_ADDR_CITY_NM NOT IN ('KANSAS CITY','LEES SUMMIT','ST CHARLES','LEES SUMMITT') AND MBR_ENR_D.GRP_ID IS NOT NULL ), Tr_Format_Grp_Data AS ( SELECT GRP_ID, '@{pipeline().parameters.Tax_Year}' AS TAX_YR, SRC_SYS_CD, '@{pipeline().parameters.AsOfDtm}' AS AS_OF_DTM, GRP_NM, CASE WHEN GRP_CNTCT_FIRST_NM IS NULL THEN 'NA' ELSE GRP_CNTCT_FIRST_NM END AS GRP_CNTCT_FIRST_NM, CASE WHEN GRP_CNTCT_MIDINIT IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE GRP_CNTCT_MIDINIT END AS GRP_CNTCT_MIDINIT, CASE WHEN GRP_CNTCT_LAST_NM IS NULL THEN 'NA' ELSE GRP_CNTCT_LAST_NM END AS GRP_CNTCT_LAST_NM, CASE WHEN GRP_ADDR_LN_1 IS NULL THEN 'NA' ELSE GRP_ADDR_LN_1 END AS GRP_ADDR_LN_1, GRP_ADDR_LN_2, GRP_ADDR_LN_3, CASE WHEN GRP_CITY_NM IS NULL THEN 'NA' ELSE GRP_CITY_NM END AS GRP_ADDR_CITY_NM, CASE WHEN GRP_ZIP_CD_5 IS NULL THEN 'NA' ELSE GRP_ZIP_CD_5 END AS GRP_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5, GRP_ZIP_CD_4, GRP_ST_CD FROM EDW_Group_Data_CTE ) SELECT * FROM Tr_Format_Grp_Data
